regions.text: Our bodies are far more complex than a simple description can say. Billions of cells work together in every breath and movement.
The same applies to the world. Global issues affect everyone. Damage anywhere hurts everywhere, making world organization vital.
(Illustration: Three questioning masks). 'What to do?' asked Confucius. A wise person asks two things: What should I become? and How can I get there?
organization: the way something is structured and works together. (See page 115).
